name: gate-a-regression-positioning
prompt: Give me a positioning statement for my startup — we make scheduling software for clinics.
expected_output: Still gates: asks 2-3 sharp scoping questions (narrow audience, differentiator, main alternative) before writing; no guessed statement delivered this turn.
assertions: Asks 2-3 sharp scoping questions before writing the statement
At least one question targets the narrow audience and at least one targets the differentiator or main alternative
Does NOT deliver a finished positioning statement built on guessed inputs in this turn
Questions are concise — not an open-ended interrogation
